original_image_tags: A piece of lined index card or paper. A single name is handwritten in dark ink at the top. The rest of the page is blank lines. At the bottom left corner, there is a printed page identifier.

elements.description: A page of lined paper with a single line of handwritten text at the top. The text reads 'Franciszek Grabowski'. The rest of the page is blank lined paper.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a lined page with a single handwritten name at the top), but Description B adds the specific quoted text 'Franciszek Grabowski' that Description A omits, without contradiction.
